title: Finnish-Inspired Values, Equity and Ethical Positioning Implementation Task
instructions: Apply one strategy from Finnish-Inspired Values, Equity and Ethical Positioning in a real classroom, preschool, leadership, parent or planning context. Upload one piece of evidence and a 150-250 word reflection explaining the principle, action, learner evidence and next adjustment.
pass_rule: Complete evidence upload and reflection using the principle-to-action structure.
